description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build Wheels that runs on push to main and tags matching v*.*.*. Build a Python package with a single ubuntu-latest job that checks out the repository, sets up Python 3.12, installs wheel and sdist requirements, builds sdist and wheel distributions, and uploads them as artifacts. Create a dependent publish job that runs on push to tags, downloads the artifacts, and publishes them to PyPI using the pypa/gh-action-pypi-publish action.
